title: Microsoft: Windows 11 users can't access C: drive on some Samsung PCs
description: Microsoft is investigating a new issue affecting some Samsung laptops running Windows 11 after installing the February 2026 security updates, in which users lose access to their C:\ drive and are unable to launch applications. [...]
author: Lawrence Abrams

title: FBI seeks victims of Steam games used to spread malware
description: The FBI is asking gamers who installed Steam titles containing malware to provide information as part of an ongoing investigation into eight malicious games uploaded to the gaming platform. [...]
author: Lawrence Abrams

title: Poland's nuclear research centre targeted by cyberattack
description: Poland's National Centre for Nuclear Research (NCBJ) says hackers targeted its IT infrastructure, but the attack was detected and blocked before causing any impact. [...]
author: Bill Toulas

title: Microsoft investigates classic Outlook sync and connection issues
description: ​Microsoft is investigating several issues causing email synchronization and connection problems when using the classic Outlook desktop client. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: From VMware to what’s next: Protecting data during hypervisor migration
description: Hypervisor migrations can introduce hidden risks that threaten data availability and recovery. Acronis explains why verified backups and cross-platform recovery are essential during VMware transitions. [...]
author: Sponsored by Acronis

title: Police sinkholes 45,000 IP addresses in cybercrime crackdown
description: An international law enforcement action codenamed "Operation Synergia III" has sinkholed tens of thousands of IP addresses and seized servers linked to cybercrime operations worldwide. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: Fake enterprise VPN sites used to steal company credentials
description: A threat actor tracked as Storm-2561 is distributing fake enterprise VPN clients from Ivanti, Cisco, and Fortinet to steal VPN credentials from unsuspecting users. [...]
author: Bill Toulas

title: Starbucks discloses data breach affecting hundreds of employees
description: Starbucks has disclosed a data breach affecting hundreds of employees after threat actors gained access to their Starbucks Partner Central accounts. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: Google fixes two new Chrome zero-days exploited in attacks
description: Google has released emergency security updates to patch two high-severity Chrome vulnerabilities exploited in zero-day attacks. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan
